replaces: existing CaseStudyHero.tsx <header> block — padding fix only; structure, animation, rich lede preserved

props.name: lede
props.note: ReactNode preserved from existing for rich italic/accent markup

nodes.name: Eyebrow text
nodes.mapping: div ts-eyebrow / font-mono tracking-[.18em] uppercase color-accent

nodes.name: Shappay title
nodes.mapping: h1 font-pixel clamp(56px,11vw,120px) with scan-beam span overlay

nodes.name: Lede text
nodes.mapping: p ts-lede / clamp(20px,2.5vw,28px) leading-[1.38] tracking-[-0.01em] max-w-[660px]

nodes.name: Meta container
nodes.mapping: dl grid auto-fit gap-px rounded-[14px] overflow-hidden bg-[var(--color-line)]

nodes.name: 6× Tile
nodes.mapping: div bg-[var(--color-bg)] px-5 py-[18px] with dt/dd inside

flagged.issue: spacing-7 (7px) has no exact token; nearest --space-sm=8px; emitted as gap-[7px] literal
